message:
Running command: $app = @"
from flask import Flask
from models import SimpleModel

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route('/')
def hello():
    model = SimpleModel('Test')
    return f'Hello {model.name}'

if __name__ == '__main__':
    app.run()
"@

$models = @"
class SimpleModel:
    def __init__(self, name):
        self.name = name
"@

$reqs = @"
Flask
"@

New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path audit_task
Set-Content -Path audit_task\models.py -Value $models -Encoding UTF8
Set-Content -Path audit_task\my_rest_app.py -Value $app -Encoding UTF8
Set-Content -Path audit_task\requirements.txt -Value $reqs -Encoding UTF8

Get-ChildItem audit_task
Get-Content audit_task\my_rest_app.py

args.command:
$app = @"
from flask import Flask
from models import SimpleModel

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route('/')
def hello():
    model = SimpleModel('Test')
    return f'Hello {model.name}'

if __name__ == '__main__':
    app.run()
"@

$models = @"
class SimpleModel:
    def __init__(self, name):
        self.name = name
"@

$reqs = @"
Flask
"@

New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path audit_task
Set-Content -Path audit_task\models.py -Value $models -Encoding UTF8
Set-Content -Path audit_task\my_rest_app.py -Value $app -Encoding UTF8
Set-Content -Path audit_task\requirements.txt -Value $reqs -Encoding UTF8
